result.reason: New and reconnected tabs should open in a more intuitive position, ideally next to the active tab, rather than always at the end of the tab strip.
result.approach: Modify the AddConnectionTab method in ConnectionWindow.cs to insert new ConnectionTab instances next to the currently active tab using the DockPanel's API, instead of always appending them to the end of the tab strip.
